summary: Latency-sensitive first-finish smoke test for Ledgerly. Backend auth, transactions, invoices (incl. PDF), employees, payroll run/list, reports (dashboard/P&L/tax), and exports (CSV+XLSX) all working. Frontend login flow + dashboard KPIs/charts render correctly; nav to Transactions/Reports/Insights pages show expected data-testids. Only blocker: AI Insights endpoint returns 500 due to EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget exceeded (infra/key issue, not code).
passed: POST /api/auth/login (admin creds) -> 200, sets cookie, returns user
POST /api/invoices -> 200, subtotal=200, tax=20, total=220 (10% tax) computed correctly
Frontend /login renders and login-submit-button navigates to /dashboard
Dashboard renders KPIs (Revenue $5,000, Expenses $3,150, Net $1,850, Outstanding $220) and Recharts line/donut charts
Nav links visible: dashboard, transactions, invoices, payroll, reports, insights
Transactions/Reports/Insights pages load with expected data-testids (add-transaction-button, run-report-button, generate-insight-button)

failed.issue: POST /api/insights/generate returns 500. Backend log: 'litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0' via emergentintegrations chat.send_message.
failed.evidence: curl POST /api/insights/generate -> HTTP 500 'Internal Server Error'; /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log shows litellm BadRequestError from server.py line 676

action_items: AI Insights: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (sk-emergent-6D5E68740A7EcFf928) has budget=0. Either request a fresh/funded key from Emergent or add graceful 402/503 error handling in POST /api/insights/generate so the UI surfaces a user-friendly message instead of 500.

notes.logout_and_update_delete_not_exercised: PUT/DELETE for transactions/invoices/employees and POST /api/auth/logout were not exercised in this smoke pass; defer to full testing.
notes.google_oauth: Skipped live Google flow as instructed.
